ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data collection */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hectopascals */,
  "sky_cover" REAL /* Sky cover in oktas (0-8) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who collected the data */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data is of high quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collector_id") REFERENCES data_collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Code of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., Atlanta, GA, USA) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the station was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Temperature, Precipitation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit associated with the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Celsius, Millimeters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor to convert the unit to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., 5 minutes, 1 hour) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "time_interval" INTEGER /* Time interval in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, NetCDF) */,
  "compression_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to compress the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the data collector */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the data collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
